indicators.name: Dense furniture arrangement
indicators.rationale: The dense arrangement of tables and chairs makes it difficult to move around and find space for yoga or stretching.

indicators.name: High ceilings
indicators.rationale: High ceilings can provide more headroom for stretching and movement.

reasoning_summary: The dense furniture arrangement makes it difficult to perform yoga or stretching in this space, despite the high ceilings providing some positive aspects.
